title: Customer Beta Feedback — Week 3
author: alice.chen
content:
# Customer Beta Feedback — Week 3

**Compiled by:** Alice Chen, Product Manager
**Period:** April 18–24, 2026
**Respondents:** 12 beta storefronts

## Summary
Overall satisfaction: 4.1/5. Key themes: speed, suggestion quality, mobile experience needs work.

## Top Feedback Themes

### Positive
- "The AI suggestions are genuinely helpful — customers are completing checkout faster."
- "Integration was straightforward. Docs are clear."
- "Response time is impressive for a beta."

### Concerns
- Mobile checkout flow has layout issues on small screens (5 reports)
- Upsell suggestions occasionally irrelevant to cart contents (3 reports)
- One storefront reported intermittent 502 errors on high-traffic bursts

## Notable Responses

**BetaCorp (john.smith@betacorp.com):**
"We've been running the AI assistant on our holiday sale pages and the uplift is real. Main ask: better handling of gift card products — the AI doesn't understand them yet. Overall very positive experience. We'll be upgrading to the paid plan at launch."

**Storefront: Maplewood Goods:**
"Mobile experience needs work but desktop is solid. Planning to go live with Launch Alpha."

## Action Items
- [ ] Mobile layout fixes — Design (target: before launch)
- [ ] Improve gift card product intent detection — Engineering (post-launch)
- [ ] Investigate 502 errors — Engineering (pre-launch if possible)

## NPS Score This Week
47 (target: >40 at launch ✓)
